tldr_artifact: 4pc Emblem of Severed Fate / 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith
tldr_key_stats: ER 250-300% (pre-C6) · Base ATK for buff · C6 game-changer · Q > E > NA
intro: Faruzan is a 4-star Anemo Bow support who provides the single strongest Anemo DMG buff in the game. Her Elemental Burst applies Anemo RES shred (30% at Lv10) and grants Anemo DMG bonus to the team. Her C6 is one of the most transformative constellations in the game — it generates continuous energy particles, provides 40% Anemo CRIT DMG, and applies her buffs automatically. Faruzan is the dedicated support for Xiao, Wanderer, and any future Anemo hypercarry. Pre-C6 she needs extreme ER investment (250-300%); post-C6 her ER needs drop dramatically.
weapon_bottom_line: Favonius Warbow is her best — ER substat + team energy particles. Sacrificial Bow provides ER + skill reset for more energy. Elegy for the End (5-star) provides team EM + ATK buffs. Pre-C6, ER is the ONLY stat that matters.

weapons.name: Favonius Warbow
weapons.notes: Best overall. ER substat + team energy. Pre-C6 Faruzan needs every ER source available.

weapons.name: Sacrificial Bow
weapons.notes: Skill reset = double particles. Less ER than Favonius but more personal energy.

weapons.name: Elegy for the End
weapons.notes: 5-star support option. Team EM + ATK buff on skill/burst hit. Best for post-C6 Faruzan.

artifact_why: Pre-C6: converts 250%+ ER into burst DMG. Faruzan's burst cost is 80 and she needs massive ER — Emblem doubles the value.
artifact_alt: 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith — post-C6: 20% ATK buff for team. Faruzan's C6 triggers her skill effects constantly, maintaining Tenacity uptime.

main_stats.sands_note: ER% pre-C6 until 250-300%. ATK% post-C6 when ER needs drop.
main_stats.goblet_note: Anemo DMG for personal damage. ATK% for pure support.
main_stats.circlet_note: CRIT Rate if using Favonius. ATK% for pure support.

sub_priority: 2. CRIT Rate — only if using Favonius Warbow

teams.name: Xiao FFXX
teams.desc: Xiao's best team. Faruzan C6 provides 30% Anemo RES shred + 40% Anemo CRIT DMG + continuous energy. Furina amplifies all damage. Xianyun enables higher plunges.

teams.name: Wanderer Hypercarry
teams.desc: Wanderer's best team. Faruzan buffs Anemo DMG. Bennett provides ATK. Zhongli shields. Consistent high DPS.

teams.name: Budget Anemo Support
teams.desc: For accounts without Xiao/Wanderer. Heizou drives with Anemo DMG. Faruzan amplifies. Works with any Anemo DPS.

rotation_code: Faruzan Q (Anemo shred + buff) → Furina E+Q (Fanfare + Hydro) → Xianyun E+Q (heal + plunge buff) → Xiao EE → Q → Plunge spam → Faruzan E (energy funnel to Xiao) → Repeat
rotation_key: Pre-C6: funnel Faruzan's E particles to Xiao. Post-C6: Faruzan's Q generates particles automatically — no funnel needed. Always cast Faruzan Q first so buffs are active for the entire DPS window.
mistakes: Not building enough ER pre-C6 — Faruzan's 80-cost burst with poor particle generation means she needs 250-300% ER. Without it, you burst once every 3 rotations. This is the #1 mistake.
Leveling NA talent — Faruzan deals zero damage with normal attacks. Her value is entirely in Q and E buffs.
Using ATK weapon pre-C6 — pre-C6, Faruzan cannot burst without ER weapon. ATK weapons are only viable post-C6.
Not funneling particles to Xiao — pre-C6, use Faruzan E then immediately swap to Xiao to catch the Anemo particles. This is essential for Xiao's energy.

seo.title: Faruzan Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Faruzan build guide. Best ER build pre-C6, Tenacity support post-C6, Xiao and Wanderer team compositions, rotation guide.
